creator: falcon@tcm.by
text:
Hello bug-followup,

  I have almost the same problem but I get no kernel panic.
  Just 100% of one of the CPUs is used by dummynet process and no
  packet can go through network. I cannot ping even myself through
  loopback. And I have to wait about 2-3 weeks before it happens. What
  can I do next time it'll happen to get some debug information?

-- 
Denis V. Klimkov
Network Administrator
TelecomMedia LLC
http://www.tcm.by
